name: Union Pacific Apple Pancakes
recipeInstructions:
1. Sift together the flour, salt, and baking powder.
2. In a separate bowl, combine the melted butter, milk, and beaten egg.
3. Stir in the vanilla and applesauce until well combined.
4. Pour the batter onto a hot, well-greased griddle or pan, using about 1/4 cup for each pancake (makes approximately 4 four-inch cakes).
5. Cook until the edges are lightly browned, then turn the pancakes over and cook the second side until golden brown.
6. Serve hot with maple syrup or apple jelly and plenty of butter.
